summary: Comprehensive testing of Operations nav group features: Move In/Out page and Housekeeping page with 3 tabs (Upcoming Cleanings, Current Housekeepers, Housekeeping Leads). All 18 backend API tests passed (100%, 1 skipped due to tenant overlap). All frontend UI features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Inline editing in Upcoming Cleanings works with time inputs, cleaner dropdown, confirmed checkbox, and notes
Archive/restore toggle working for both Housekeepers and Housekeeping Leads tabs
Notification preset dialog has all 4 quick options (3 days, 1 day, day of, time of) plus custom date/time
Move In/Out page correctly displays two-table layout with upcoming moves sorted by date
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_operations_features.py (created comprehensive test suite for Operations pages)
seed_data_creation: Existing data: 1 housekeeper (Maria), 1 housekeeping lead (John), 1 cleaning record for Hi (Unit 8). Test data created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Operations nav group has two sub-pages: 1) Move In/Out with two tables (move-ins left, move-outs right) sorted by date with bell icons for notifications, 2) Housekeeping with 3 tabs: Upcoming Cleanings (inline editable spreadsheet), Current Housekeepers (CRUD with archive), Housekeeping Leads (CRUD with archive). Auto-notifications are created when tenants are added (housekeeping confirmation 1 day before move-out, missing housekeeper warning 7 days before). Cleaning records are auto-created for tenants with move-out dates.

operations_nav_group.notes: Operations group appears in sidebar with expandable sub-menu containing Move In/Out and Housekeeping links

move_in_out_page_layout.notes: Page shows two tables side-by-side: Upcoming Move-Ins (left, 4 rows) and Upcoming Move-Outs (right, 7 rows), sorted by date

move_in_out_data_enrichment.notes: Each row shows property_name, unit_number, tenant name, move_in_date, move_out_date with bell icon for notifications

notification_preset_dialog.notes: Bell icon opens dialog with 4 quick options: 3 days before, 1 day before, day of, time of, plus custom date/time input

notification_creation_from_move_page.notes: Creating notification from preset works - '3 days before check-in' notification appeared in Notifications page with 'move in' category

housekeeping_page_tabs.notes: Page loads with 3 tabs: Upcoming Cleanings (default), Current Housekeepers, Housekeeping Leads

upcoming_cleanings_table.notes: Shows cleaning records with inline editable fields: Unit, Check In/Out dates, In Time, Out Time, Clean Time, Assigned Cleaner dropdown, Done checkbox, Notes

upcoming_cleanings_inline_editing.notes: All inline editing works - time inputs, cleaner dropdown (selected Maria), confirmed checkbox, notes input

housekeepers_crud.notes: Create, edit, archive, delete housekeepers all working. Archive removes from default list.

housekeepers_archive_toggle.notes: Show/Hide Archived toggle correctly shows/hides archived housekeepers in separate 'ARCHIVED' section

housekeeping_leads_crud.notes: Create, edit, archive, delete leads all working. Fields: name, contact, call_time, interview_pay, trial, notes, additional_notes

housekeeping_leads_archive_toggle.notes: Show/Hide Archived toggle works for leads tab as well

backend_move_ins_outs_endpoint.notes: GET /api/move-ins-outs returns list with enriched property_name and unit_number fields

backend_housekeepers_crud.notes: All CRUD operations working: list, list with archived, create, update, archive (via is_archived field), delete

backend_housekeeping_leads_crud.notes: All CRUD operations working: list, list with archived, create, update, archive, delete

backend_cleaning_records.notes: GET /api/cleaning-records returns records, supports ?days param. PUT /api/cleaning-records/{id} updates record

auto_notification_on_tenant_create.notes: Skipped due to tenant overlap validation. Logic is implemented: creates cleaning record + 2 housekeeping notifications on tenant creation

backend_move_notification_create.notes: POST /api/notifications with category=move_in or move_out works correctly
